extensionDescription.message: Re: LeechBlock NG - A community fork of LeechBlock for blocking time-wasting sites.

alertRetrieveError.message: Error: Unable to retrieve options from browser storage.

supportText.message:
LeechBlock will always be free to use, but if it has improved your life,
please consider supporting its continued development by
making a contribution or writing a review.

alertSitesBlockedIn.message: Sites in Block Set $SET$ will be blocked in $SECS$ seconds.

alertSitesBlockedInNamed.message: Sites in Block Set $SET$ ($NAME$) will be blocked in $SECS$ seconds.

blockedWarningHeading.message: The page you're trying to access has been blocked by LeechBlock.

delayedWarningHeading.message: The page you're trying to access has been temporarily blocked by LeechBlock.

blockedUnblockAt.message: The page will be unblocked at:

delayedUnblockInPre.message: The page will be unblocked in

passwordPrompt.message: Enter the password to access the blocked page:

goalRequiredHeading.message: Set a goal before opening this page.

goalErrorBadMinutes.message: Enter a positive number of minutes.

addSitesSitesLabel.message: Enter the domain names of the sites to block (one item per line):

addSitesExceptionsNote.message: Note: Any exceptions in the list of sites will be ignored!

lockdownDurationLabel.message: Enter the duration of the lockdown:

lockdownSelectLabel.message: Select the sites to block during the lockdown:

lockdownAlertNoDuration.message: Please enter a non-zero duration for the lockdown.

lockdownAlertNoSets.message: Please select the sites to lockdown.

overrideSuspendPre.message: Allow blocking to be suspended for

overrideLimitReachedPre.message: You have reached your limit of

overrideAlertNoDuration.message: Please enter a non-zero duration for the override.

overrideActivatedPre.message: Override activated. Blocking will be suspended until

overrideNoSetsNote.message:
Note: Override will have no effect because you have not selected
"Allow temporary override for these sites" for any block sets.

overrideSetsPre.message: Override will be applied to sites in:

overridePromptPassword.message: Enter the password to activate override:

overridePromptAccessCode.message: Enter the following code to activate override:

diagnosticsUrlLabel.message: Enter the fully specified URL to test against your current block sets:

diagnosticsTip.message: Tip: You can copy/paste from your browser's location bar.

diagnosticsAlertBadURL.message: Please enter the URL in the correct format (as a fully specified URL).

optWhatToBlockIntro.message: In this section, specify the sites you want to block.

optSetNameLabel.message: Enter a custom name for this block set (optional):

optSitesLabel.message: Enter the domain names of the sites to block (one item per line):

optSitesNote.message: Note: Do not include URL protocol prefixes such as http:// or file://.

optSitesTip.message: Tip: Use * or ** as wildcard, + to prefix exceptions, > to prefix referrers, and ~ to prefix keywords.

optGlobalPolicyIntro.message: Global Policy Layer runs before block sets.

optGoalModeIntro.message: Goal Mode allows whitelisted domains and asks for a goal before other web pages are opened.

optGoalWhitelistLabel.message: Enter domains that Goal Mode should always allow (one item per line):

optGoalDomainModeExactWww.message: Allow this domain and www only

optWhenToBlockIntro.message: In this section, specify when you want to block these sites.

optTimePeriodsLabel.message: Enter the time periods within which to block these sites (optional):

optTimePeriodsTitle.message: Leave blank for no time periods

optTimeLimitLabel.message: Enter a time limit after which to block these sites (optional):

optTimeLimitTitle.message: Leave blank for no time limit

optCountFocus.message: Count time spent on these sites only when browser tab is active

optCountAudio.message: Count time spent on these sites only when browser tab is playing audio

optSelectWhenLabel.message: Select when to block these sites:

optConjModeOr.message: within time periods OR after time limit

optConjModeAnd.message: within time periods AND after time limit

optSelectDaysLabel.message: Select the days on which to block these sites:

optHowToBlockIntro.message: In this section, specify how you want to block these sites.

optBlockURLLabel.message: Enter the fully specified URL of the page to show instead of these blocked sites:

optBlockURLTitle.message: Use $$U to pass URL of blocked page

optPasswordRequireLabel.message: Select the requirement for the password page:

optPasswordRequireSetSpecific.message: Require the user to enter a set-specific password (see below)

optPasswordRequireOverride.message: Require the user to enter the override password

optPasswordRequireAccess.message: Require the user to enter the access control password

optCustomMsgLabel.message: Enter a custom message for the blocking page (optional):

optApplyFilter.message: Apply filter instead of blocking page:

optCloseTab.message: Close tab instead of blocking page

optActiveBlock.message: Immediately block pages on these sites once blocking conditions are met

optMinBlockPre.message: Always block sites for at least

optMinBlockTitle.message: Leave blank for no minimum block time

optShowKeyword.message: Show matched keyword on blocking page

optTitleOnly.message: Check for keywords only in page title

optDelayFirstPre.message: Block only first accessed page of

optDelayAllowPre.message: Allow access to sites for only

optDelayAllowPost.message: minutes after delaying/password page is used

optDelaySecsPost.message: seconds when delaying page is used

optDelayAutoLoad.message: Automatically load blocked page when delay countdown reaches zero

optDelayCancel.message: Cancel delay countdown if delaying page loses focus

optReloadSecsPre.message: Attempt to reload blocked page every

optAddHistory.message: Add blocked page to browser history

optAllowOverride.message: Allow temporary override for these sites

optAdvancedWarning.message: Be sure you understand the consequences of these options before changing any of them!

optDisable.message: Disable this block set (for debugging purposes)

optShowTimer.message: Show countdown timer for this block set

optAllowRefers.message: Treat referrers as allow-conditions rather than block-conditions

optAllowKeywords.message: Treat keywords as allow-conditions rather than block-conditions

optWaitSecsPost.message: second(s) after page has loaded before checking blocking conditions

optPrevOpts.message: Prevent access to options for this block set at times when these sites are blocked

optPrevGenOpts.message: Prevent access to General options at times when these sites are blocked

optPrevExts.message: Prevent access to Extensions page at times when these sites are blocked

optPrevSettings.message: Prevent access to Settings page at times when these sites are blocked

optPrevOverride.message: Allow override to apply to Extensions and Settings pages

optSitesURLLabel.message: Load list of sites from URL:

optSitesURLTitle.message: Use $$S to pass block set number and $$T to pass UTC timestamp in milliseconds

optRegexpBlockLabel.message: Use regular expression to match URLs to block (overrides list of sites):

optRegexpAllowLabel.message: Use regular expression to match URLs to allow (overrides exceptions in list of sites):

optRegexpKeywordLabel.message: Use regular expression to match keywords (overrides keywords in list of sites):

optIgnoreHash.message: Ignore fragment (hash part) when checking URL

optGenAccessReqLabel.message: Select the requirement for access to options:

optGenAccessNone.message: Don't require the user to enter any password or access code

optGenAccessPassword.message: Require the user to enter a password

optGenAccessCode32.message: Require the user to enter a random 32-character access code

optGenAccessCode64.message: Require the user to enter a random 64-character access code

optGenAccessCode128.message: Require the user to enter a random 128-character access code

optGenHidePassword.message: Hide password characters when entered at prompt

optGenPreventAccessLabel.message: Prevent all access to options during these time periods:

optGenTimerMaxPre.message: Show timer only when time left is less than

optGenTimerBadge.message: Show timer as icon badge (if time left is less than 10 minutes)

optGenTimerTip.message: Tip: Double-click on the over-page timer to hide it at any time (e.g., before printing page).

optGenWarnImmediate.message: Only display warning message on pages that will be immediately blocked

optGenOverrideMinsPre.message: Allow blocking to be suspended for

optGenOverrideMinsTitle.message: Leave blank to specify a duration when the override is activated

optGenOverrideReqLabel.message: Select the requirement for activating the override:

optGenOverrideAccessControl.message: Require the user to enter the access control password (see above)

optGenOverridePredefined.message: Require the user to enter a predefined access code (see below)

optGenOverrideSeparate.message: Require the user to enter a separate override password (see below)

optGenOverrideConfirm.message: Show confirmation message when override is activated

optGenOverrideNote.message: Note: You must also select "Allow temporary override for these sites" for the relevant block sets.

optGenDisableLink.message: Disable hyperlink to blocked page on blocking/delaying/password page

optGenIgnoreJumpPre.message: Ignore jumps in time spent greater than

optGenAllFocused.message: Treat browser windows as always focused

optGenUseDocFocus.message: Use document focus for counting time on active tab (Android only)

optGenSyncStorage.message: Use sync storage for options (experimental: use at your own risk!)

optGenAllowLBWebsite.message: Always allow access to LeechBlock website

optGenProcessActiveTabs.message: Process only active tabs (improves performance when multiple tabs open)

optGenImportNote.message: Note: Import will be disabled if you have prevented access to the options for any block set.

optGenAutoExportSync.message: Automatically export options to sync storage (as backup) whenever options are saved

optAboutIntro.message:
Re: LeechBlock NG is a community-maintained fork of LeechBlock NG (Next Generation), a simple productivity tool designed to
block those time-wasting sites that can suck the life out of your working day.
All you need to do is specify which sites to block and when to block them.

optDlgAccessPrevent.message: You have prevented access to options during these time periods:

optDlgBadAccessPreventTimes.message: Completely preventing access to options is a bad idea! Please enter different time periods.

optDlgBadTimes.message: Please enter the time periods in the correct format. Use 24-hour clock format (HHMM) for times, a dash (-) between start time and end time, and commas or spaces to separate time periods.

optDlgBadTimeLimit.message: Please enter the time limit in the correct format (as a positive number).

optDlgBadTimeLimitOffset.message: Please enter the time limit offset in the correct format (as a non-zero integer).

optDlgBadClockOffset.message: Please enter the clock offset in the correct format (as a non-zero integer).

optDlgBadSeconds.message: Please enter the number of seconds in the correct format (as a positive whole number).

optDlgBadMinutes.message: Please enter the number of minutes in the correct format (as a positive whole number).

optDlgBadHours.message: Please enter the number of hours in the correct format (as a positive whole number).

optDlgBadOverrideLimitNum.message: Please enter the number of overrides in the correct format (as a positive whole number).

optDlgBadBlockURL.message: Please enter the URL for the blocking page in the correct format (as a fully specified URL).

optDlgBadNumSets.message: Please enter the number of block sets in the correct format (as a positive whole number).

optDlgNoImportFile.message: Please select a file containing the options to import.

optDlgImportError.message: Error: Unable to import options from file.

optDlgImportSyncError.message: Error: Unable to import options from sync storage.

optDlgImportSuccess.message: The options have been imported successfully.

optDlgImportSuccessNote.message: Note: The imported options will not be applied until you Save Options.

optDlgExportSyncError.message: Error: Unable to export options to sync storage.

optDlgExportSuccess.message: The options have been exported successfully.

optDlgLockdownCancel.message: The active lockdown has been canceled.

optDlgResetOptions.message: The options for this block set have been reset to the defaults.

optDlgResetOptionsNote.message: Note: The defaults will not be applied until you Save Options.

optDlgPromptPassword.message: Enter the password for access to options:

optDlgPromptAccessCode.message: Enter the following code for access to options:
